channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th June
item.description:

item.title: Obstruction caused by tree problem, 4th June
item.description:
I have contacted Cheltenham B.C. and they advised me to contact Gloucestershire C.C.. It's regarding an overhanging tree on the footpath between Bradley Road and Croft Road. Our postcode GL538DU. The tree is now very high and covering the footpath also our back garden. I would appreciate if someone can visit and resolve this problem.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 4th June
item.description:
28day with road closure CW edge deterioration approx 700x500x65mm perm repair unmarked and no photos due to traffic volume. (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet
